original text:
Should we talk with U.S. Congressmen who we know support campaign finance reform?
Our Theory of Change only requires support from our State Legislators. The beauty of our strategy is that we do not need Congress and are in fact going around them. Staying focused on our strategy of working through the states is our fastest (and most reliable) path to victory. If you have further questions about this, contact your state team at [yourstate]@wolf-pac.com (ex: newyork@wolf-pac.com).

original text:
Take part in this worldwide community opportunity coming to the Salt Lake area. Choose to help from greeting people, interacting with families and people of all ages with story-related activities such as Story Walks or The Story Circle, setting up or breaking down sets, assisting with parking, overseeing tech, or becoming a marketing or cultural connections intern. All Story Crossroads events are free and open to the public. Your volunteering extends this gift to the community that gathers and unifies people across generations and cultures to celebrate story in all its forms - pure storytelling, story music, story dance, story theatre and stories with the visual arts.
Please complete the online form by clicking here.
For questions or comments, please call Rachel Hedman at (801) 870-5799 or email storycrossroads@gmail.com. Applications are accepted year-round. Explore this Story Crossroads website for general information.

original text:
I will be attending GenCon this week. If you will be in Indianapolis and would like to playtest either Titans of Industry or Municipality, I would be happy to run a session. Just send me an email at mkeller@visiblehandgames.com and we'll arrange a session. I'll run the same contest I did for DexCon. If you playtest one of my games and win, mention this post and I will send you a playtest copy of Pioneer.
Alternatively, if you can't playtest but would like to just chat about game design, I'm always up for that. I will have the Visible Hand Games logo on my bag and/or badge, so feel free to say hi.
